title: Wookiee flat-biscuit
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''[[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] Flat-Biscuits''' were a kind of Wookiee food that was flat and sometimes served with [[forest-honey]] glazed on.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]''

===Non-canon appearances===
*<!-- 2013-10-11 -->''[[Star Wars: Tiny Death Star]]'' {{C|Cut}}
